70010000000023.description:
Step into a world of adventure

Forget everything you know about The Legend of Zelda games. Step into a world of discovery, exploration and adventure in The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild, a boundary-breaking new game in the acclaimed series. Travel across fields, through forests and to mountain peaks as you discover what has become of the ruined kingdom of Hyrule in this stunning open-air adventure.

Visit amiibo.nintendo.eu for compatible amiibo™ and the latest information.
70010000000023.intro:
No kingdom. No memories.
After a 100-year slumber, all he had left...was hope.
70010000000023.name: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild

70010000000706.description: Explore an endless ocean of clouds, where the last remnants of civilisation live on the backs of colossal beasts called Titans. Experience the story of Rex and his new friend, Pyra, a mysterious being known as a Blade who grants him tremendous power. Together, search for Pyra’s long lost home Elysium, the ultimate paradise for all of humanity.
70010000000706.intro: Search for the ultimate paradise, Elysium, with your companion, Pyra.
70010000000706.name: Xenoblade Chronicles™ 2

70010000004515.description: Experience everything you love about Pokémon battles all in one place – in Pokémon Champions for Nintendo Switch. This battle-focused game features familiar mechanics such as Pokémon types, Abilities, and moves, allowing new and experienced Trainers alike to experiment with rich and varied strategies.
70010000004515.intro: It’s time to become a champion
70010000004515.name: Pokémon Champions

70010000027620.description:
If the hustle and bustle of modern life’s got you down, Tom Nook has a business venture up his sleeve that he knows you’ll adore: his brand-new, ultra-exclusive Nook Inc. Deserted Island Getaway Package! 

•	Customise your character and home, and decorate the landscape (with furniture, if you like!), as you create your very own island paradise.

•	Experience a robust new crafting system – collect materials to construct everything from furniture to tools!

•	Enjoy a variety of relaxing activities like gardening, fishing, decorating, interacting with charming NPCs, and more, as classic Animal Crossing experiences come to life in fun new ways within the deserted-island setting.

•	Up to eight players can reside on an island; four residents of the same island can play together simultaneously on a single system.

•	Eight players can play together on one player’s island via online multiplayer or local wireless.
70010000027620.name: Animal Crossing: New Horizons

70010000029712.description:
A sprawling RPG classic is reborn in Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition for Nintendo Switch. In the aftermath of a devastating invasion, embark on a journey that will take you beyond the horizon. Can you change the future, or is your race doomed to extinction?

With a brand new epilogue adventure, HD visuals, smoother gameplay, remastered music tracks, and more, new and returning players can freshly experience the ultimate version of Shulk and co.’s epic RPG adventure!
70010000029712.intro: Uncover the secrets of the Monado and save the world
70010000029712.name: Xenoblade Chronicles Definitive Edition

70010000032446.description:
Pokémon Café Mix just got a makeover and is ready to re-open! Now it's bustling with Pokémon!
The cute vibe is just the same, but we've really powered up the thrills and fun that you'll get from catching and training Pokémon and completing puzzles!

You’re the owner of a café that Pokémon visit.
With your Pokémon staff, complete puzzles to prepare drinks and dishes, and treat your Pokémon customers to a wonderful time at the café!

■Make your Pokémon into café staff!
All the café's clientele are Pokémon!
If you make friends with Pokémon by presenting them with yummy dishes, they'll join your staff. Then you'll be able to develop brand-new dishes with your Pokémon chums! And when they get wind of your delicious new dishes, even more new Pokémon will flock to your establishment to check them out!
Recruit lots of Pokémon to your café crew and make your café a fun place to be.

■Solve cooking puzzles with your Pokémon helpers!
Each of your Pokémon assistants will have their own special skills to bring to bear on the cooking puzzles. With new specialty gimmicks, the thrills you get from the puzzles will get a whole new boost!
Train up your Pokémon staff and aim for a three-star establishment!
70010000032446.intro:
Blend, link, and clear!
Enjoy fun culinary puzzles with Pokémon!
70010000032446.name: Pokémon Café ReMix

70010000043293.description:
Join Trainers from around the world as they head for Aeos Island to compete in Unite Battles! In Unite Battles, Trainers face off in 5-on-5 team battles to see who can score the most points within the allotted time. Teamwork is key as you and your teammates defeat wild Pokémon, level up and evolve your partner Pokémon, and knock out the opposing team’s Pokémon to prevent them from scoring points. Put your teamwork to the test, and take home the win! 

Key Features:
•BATTLE IN STYLE: Take to the field while looking your best in Holowear! Thanks to a special technology developed using Aeos energy, Trainers can deck out their Pokémon in a variety of holographic outfits—with new styles arriving regularly!

•UNITE MOVES: Unleash the true power of your Pokémon with Unite Moves! Leverage these all-new Pokémon moves, which are only possible while in Unite Battles, and turn the tide of even the direst situations.

•RANK UP: Looking to prove how skilled you are? Participate in ranked matches, and earn points as you climb up the global leaderboard!

•COMMUNICATION IS KEY: Even the most skilled Trainers recognize how important communication is to their team’s success. Leverage signals, quick-chat messages, and—for the first time in a Pokémon title—voice chat to communicate and stay in sync with your team.

•CROSS-PLATFORM PLAY: Play with Trainers around the world on the Nintendo Switch system or on a compatible smartphone thanks to cross-platform support. Trainers may use their Pokémon Trainer Club account or Nintendo Account on both Nintendo Switch and mobile to easily keep their progress synced between devices.

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
70010000043293.intro: Team up and take down the opposition in Pokémon’s first 5-on-5 strategic team battle game!
70010000043293.name: Pokémon UNITE

70010000046406.description:
In the newest game in the Kirby series, you'll venture into an unknown new world where civilisation and nature have become one. Use Kirby's familiar actions - inhale, spit out, jump and copy - to move freely around as you delve deep into 3D stages.

◆ Aim to save the Waddle Dees
You'll set out on your adventure with an important mission: to save the Waddle Dees that have been captured by mysterious enemies called the Beast Pack. In each stage, you'll need to fight members of the Beast Pack and solve challenges as you work to reach the goal and save the captured Waddle Dees.

◆ Try out the new Drill and Ranger Copy Abilities
In addition to experiencing your favourite Copy Abilities from the series in glorious 3D, there are also new abilities at your disposal. Drill lets you burrow underground, while Ranger lets you fire shooting-star shots!

◆ Work together in 2-player co-op as Kirby and Bandana Waddle Dee
You can share a Joy-Con to explore the new world as a team!
70010000046406.name: Kirby and the Forgotten Land

70010000053337.description:
Bringing together the futures of Xenoblade Chronicles and Xenoblade Chronicles 2, this title will take players to the world of Aionios, home to two hostile nations.

Keves: a nation where mechanical technology was developed. Their armies are composed of units consisting mainly of combat vehicles. They use units of small, mobile weapons operated by soldiers riding them.

Agnus: a nation strong in ether, a magical technology. Their forces are built around units that specialise in ether combat, and they fight with small, mobile, autonomous weapons that use ether technology.

Six soldiers hailing from these nations, will take part in a grand tale with life as its central theme.
70010000053337.name: Xenoblade Chronicles 3

70010000063715.description:
Embark on a perilous quest to find the missing princess and unravel the truth behind a cataclysmic event that has sent the kingdom into turmoil.

You’ll decide your own path through the sprawling landscapes of Hyrule and the mysterious islands floating in the vast skies above.
70010000063715.intro: Explore the vast land – and skies – of Hyrule
70010000063715.name: The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom

70010000084609.description:
Get ready for the biggest party yet in Super Mario Party Jamboree. From running through merry-go-rounds to motion-control minigolf, this jamboree is jam-packed with over 110 minigames – the most of any Mario Party game to date!

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
70010000084609.intro: Join the latest Mario Party for a jamboree of seven boards and over 110 minigames!
70010000084609.name: Super Mario Party Jamboree

70010000084767.description:
The galaxy’s greatest bounty hunter Samus Aran will embark on a new mission in Metroid Prime 4: Beyond.

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.

Screenshots taken from Nintendo Switch 2 version
70010000084767.name: Metroid Prime 4: Beyond

70010000088833.description:
Fight for survival while exploring the vast expanses of an alien world in Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition. This visually enhanced version of the epic sci-fi RPG features additional content – including new story elements.

The year is 2054. Earth has been destroyed by an intergalactic war between two alien races, and humanity is on the brink of annihilation. A small number of survivors, aboard the USS White Whale, crash land on the vast and untamed planet Mira – and now it falls to you, as a member of BLADE, to help bring humanity back from the edge of extinction.
70010000088833.intro: This is where we build our future
70010000088833.name: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition

70010000089072.description:
Discover a workout that fits your lifestyle in Fitness: Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer. Choose from six fully-voiced personal trainers and get moving as you punch and dodge to the rhythm of 30 new instrumental songs.

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
70010000089072.name: Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer

70010000094235.description:
An urban redevelopment plan is underway in Lumiose City! The goal: to turn it into a place Pokémon and people can truly share. Shortly after arriving, you’ll choose from one of these partner Pokémon to accompany you on your journey – Chikorita, Tepig or Totodile. 

Together, you can explore the streets of this vast city or visit Wild Zones – habitats where you’ll encounter wild Pokémon. To catch them, aim carefully and throw a Poké Ball or take them on with the help of the Pokémon on your team.
70010000094235.intro: An adventure in a thriving Pokémon metropolis!
70010000094235.name: Pokémon Legends: Z-A

70010000096818.description:
Explore an even more breathtaking Hyrule on Nintendo Switch 2. 

With higher resolution, improved frame rates, and HDR support, the expansive world of Hyrule has never looked better.

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
70010000096818.intro: Your epic adventure is now enhanced for Nintendo Switch 2
70010000096818.name: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70010000096822.description:
Explore the land, sky, and depths of Hyrule like never before on Nintendo Switch 2. 

With higher resolution, improved frame rates, and HDR support, the expansive world of Hyrule has never looked better.

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
70010000096822.intro: Your epic adventure is now enhanced for Nintendo Switch 2
70010000096822.name: The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70010000096826.description:
Jamboree TV is a new way to play that's all about audience participation! Take on a variety of challenges along with Mario and friends. Let the games begin!

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
70010000096826.intro: A super-charged celebration for Nintendo Switch 2
70010000096826.name: Super Mario Party Jamboree – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Jamboree TV

70010000096830.description:
Kirby and the Forgotten Land – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Star-Crossed World includes Kirby and the Forgotten Land, improved graphics and frame rate throughout, plus a new story: Star Crossed World.

After the world is struck by a powerful meteor, Kirby must use his amazing abilities, including some all-new Mouthful Modes to clear a trail through uncharted territory in this exciting adventure.
70010000096830.intro: Kirby's adventure continues on Nintendo Switch 2!
70010000096830.name: Kirby and the Forgotten Land – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Star-Crossed World

70010000099366.description:
An urban redevelopment plan is underway in Lumiose City! The goal: to turn it into a place Pokémon and people can truly share. Shortly after arriving, you’ll choose from one of these partner Pokémon to accompany you on your journey – Chikorita, Tepig or Totodile. 

Together, you can explore the streets of this vast city or visit Wild Zones – habitats where you’ll encounter wild Pokémon. To catch them, aim carefully and throw a Poké Ball or take them on with the help of the Pokémon on your team.
70010000099366.intro: Explore Lumiose City on Nintendo Switch 2
70010000099366.name: Pokémon Legends: Z-A – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70010000102053.description: Unwind with puzzles in Pokémon Friends! Solve sets of three randomly selected puzzles to help untangle your mind – then place the yarn you obtain into the Plush-O-Matic, a special machine that creates in-game Pokémon plush! As you try to make them all, you can track your crafted plush in the catalogue. You can also mark your calendar with a stamp each day you play.
70010000102053.intro: Cosy up with a variety of bite-sized puzzles – and collect virtual Pokémon plush!
70010000102053.name: Pokémon Friends

70010000104188.description:
Blast off for a gravity-defying experience in Super Mario Galaxy! Explore planets, recover the Grand Stars and travel the universe in the Comet Observatory on a quest to stop Bowser from creating his very own galaxy.

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
70010000104188.name: Super Mario Galaxy

70010000104193.description:
Enter a new universe of adventure beyond the stars in Super Mario Galaxy 2! Climb aboard Starship Mario and set out to discover more galaxies, more abilities and even more gravity-defying fun.

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
70010000104193.intro: Blast back into space with Mario and Yoshi!
70010000104193.name: Super Mario Galaxy 2

70010000104850.description:
The galaxy’s greatest bounty hunter Samus Aran will embark on a new mission in Metroid Prime 4: Beyond.

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
70010000104850.name: Metroid Prime 4: Beyond – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70010000110441.description:
A carefree new life is just beyond the horizon! Step off the plane and onto your very own deserted island where new friends, discoveries and opportunities are waiting for you.

New ways to play
The Nintendo Switch 2 Edition of Animal Crossing: New Horizons uses the unique features of the console to offer even more ways to enjoy your island paradise!

Your island, clearer than ever
With the enhanced 4K resolution of the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, you’ll be able to see your island and its residents even clearer than before!

Get creative with mouse controls
Use the intuitive mouse controls of the Joy-Con 2 controller to redecorate your home, organise your furniture, create Custom Designs and even draw posts for the bulletin board.

New item: Megaphone
Purchase the Megaphone from Nook's Cranny, then use it to find your island friends by calling out their names. The built-in microphone of Nintendo Switch 2 will help find where they are, even if they’re far away from you!

Play with more friends at once!
In the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, up to 12 players can play together on one island online or up to eight players via local wireless play.

With GameChat, you’ll be able to talk to your friends while playing with them. And by connecting a compatible USB-C camera, such as the Nintendo Switch 2 camera (sold separately), they’ll be able to see your expressions as you play!
70010000110441.intro: Welcome to the Deserted Island Getaway Package!
70010000110441.name: Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70010000115568.description:
Every course contains its very own Wonder Flower – collect one, and anything can happen. From moving pipes to tilting terrain, singing Piranha Plants to stampeding Bulrushes, skydiving to space walks, you never know what’ll happen next. You might even transform into something totally new!

Lots of multiplayer fun awaits in this area of Bellabel Park! Visit the Local Multiplayer Plaza to enjoy 17 different co-operative and competitive attractions, where up to four people can play together – even via GameShare!

Alternatively, you can head to the Game Room Plaza and play with friends and family either online or via local wireless. Six different attractions await here, allowing up to 12 players to work together or compete for first place!
70010000115568.name: Super Mario Bros. Wonder – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park

70010000116664.description:
Become the caretaker of an island full of silliness, drama, love and other surprises in Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream for Nintendo Switch!

Create all sorts of Mii characters based on your family and friends, someone you admire, or someone completely original! From their appearance to their personality traits and even little quirks, there are all sorts of ways to customise your Mii characters – including face parts that are unique to this game.

By picking up and placing Mii characters next to each other, they’ll start hanging out together. Watch as they forge unlikely friendships, get into fights, fall in (and out of) love unexpectedly, and so much more. 

Expand and design your island as you see fit. Place homes, shops, restaurants, and more to give your island residents new hang out spots to visit. Want to make your Mii characters feel at home? Decorate their rooms with different interior sets, including furniture, wallpaper and floors to match their vibe. 

The demo of this game may contain product placement and advertising.
70010000116664.intro: Your Mii characters, their wacky world!
70010000116664.name: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream

70010000116670.description:
Fight for survival while exploring the vast expanses of an alien world in Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition. This visually enhanced version of the epic sci-fi RPG features additional content – including new story elements.

The year is 2054. Earth has been destroyed by an intergalactic war between two alien races, and humanity is on the brink of annihilation. A small number of survivors, aboard the USS White Whale, crash land on the vast and untamed planet Mira – and now it falls to you, as a member of BLADE, to help bring humanity back from the edge of extinction.

With smoother frame rates and up to 4K resolution in TV mode, the sprawling alien landscapes of planet Mira have never looked better.
70010000116670.intro: Your epic adventure is now enhanced for Nintendo Switch 2
70010000116670.name: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70010000116686.description: Access a selection of classic Virtual Boy games on your Nintendo Switch 2 or Nintendo Switch, including Galactic Pinball and Teleroboxer. Dedicated accessories required to play are available to buy from My Nintendo Store!
70010000116686.name: Virtual Boy – Nintendo Classics

70010000118614.description:
This is the English language version.

The thrill of the Kanto region, as well as familiar Pokémon, are just as you remember them – with updated graphics compared to the original Game Boy title. The Sevii Islands – not present in Pokémon Red Version – have also been added, greatly expanding the areas you can explore and the scope of your adventure.

Some excitement doesn’t fade no matter how many years pass. Whether it’s choosing your first partner Pokémon, confronting a sinister organisation or encountering a legend, a world of dreams and adventures with Pokémon awaits. Let’s go!

It is planned to make this title compatible with Pokémon HOME in the future.
70010000118614.intro: Immerse yourself in the adventure once again in Pokémon FireRed Version!
70010000118614.name: (English) Pokémon FireRed Version

70010000118619.description:
This is the English language version.

The thrill of the Kanto region, as well as familiar Pokémon, are just as you remember them – with updated graphics compared to the original Game Boy title. The Sevii Islands – not present in Pokémon Green Version – have also been added, greatly expanding the areas you can explore and the scope of your adventure.

Some excitement doesn’t fade no matter how many years pass. Whether it’s choosing your first partner Pokémon, confronting a sinister organisation or encountering a legend, a world of dreams and adventures with Pokémon awaits. Let’s go!

It is planned to make this title compatible with Pokémon HOME in the future.
70010000118619.intro: Immerse yourself in the adventure once again in Pokémon LeafGreen Version!
70010000118619.name: (English) Pokémon LeafGreen Version

70010000118624.description:
Esta es la versión del juego en español.

La magia de la región de Kanto y muchos rostros Pokémon familiares siguen estando presentes tal y como los recuerdas, pero ahora el juego incorpora gráficos modernizados en comparación con el título original de Game Boy. Por otro lado, también incluye un nuevo añadido con respecto a Pokémon Edición Roja: Archi7, un archipiélago de islas que amplía considerablemente el territorio que puedes explorar y hace que tu aventura sea aún más grande.

Algunos recuerdos no desaparecen con el paso del tiempo... Tanto si vas a elegir a tu primer compañero Pokémon, enfrentarte a una siniestra organización o tener un encuentro legendario, te espera un mundo de sueños y aventuras con los Pokémon. ¡Adelante!

Está previsto que este título sea compatible con Pokémon HOME en el futuro.
70010000118624.intro: ¡Vuelve a lanzarte de lleno a la aventura en Pokémon Edición Rojo Fuego!
70010000118624.name: (Español) Pokémon Edición Rojo Fuego

70010000118626.description:
Esta es la versión del juego en español.

La magia de la región de Kanto y muchos rostros Pokémon familiares siguen estando presentes tal y como los recuerdas, pero ahora el juego incorpora gráficos modernizados en comparación con el título original de Game Boy. Por otro lado, también incluye un nuevo añadido con respecto a Pokémon Edición Verde: Archi7, un archipiélago de islas que amplía considerablemente el territorio que puedes explorar y hace que tu aventura sea aún más grande.

Algunos recuerdos no desaparecen con el paso del tiempo... Tanto si vas a elegir a tu primer compañero Pokémon, enfrentarte a una siniestra organización o tener un encuentro legendario, te espera un mundo de sueños y aventuras con los Pokémon. ¡Adelante!

Está previsto que este título sea compatible con Pokémon HOME en el futuro.
70010000118626.intro: ¡Vuelve a lanzarte de lleno a la aventura en Pokémon Edición Verde Hoja!
70010000118626.name: (Español) Pokémon Edición Verde Hoja

70010000118630.description:
Il s'agit ici de la version en français.

Retrouvez l'engouement de la région de Kanto et vos Pokémon favoris comme si vous ne les aviez jamais quittés, avec des graphismes améliorés par rapport au jeu Game Boy d'origine. Les Îles Sevii, qui n'existaient pas dans Pokémon Version Rouge, ont été ajoutées afin d'enrichir votre aventure et vous proposer encore plus de lieux à explorer !

Certains souvenirs restent à jamais gravés dans nos mémoires. Qu'il s'agisse de choisir votre premier partenaire Pokémon, d'affronter une sombre organisation ou encore de faire des rencontres légendaires, un monde de rêves, d'aventures et de Pokémon vous attend !

Ce titre est prévu pour devenir compatible avec Pokémon HOME.
70010000118630.intro: Revivez l'aventure Pokémon Version Rouge Feu Version !
70010000118630.name: (Français) Pokémon Version Rouge Feu

70010000118632.description:
Il s'agit ici de la version en français.

Retrouvez l'engouement de la région de Kanto et vos Pokémon favoris comme si vous ne les aviez jamais quittés, avec des graphismes améliorés par rapport au jeu Game Boy d'origine. Les Îles Sevii, qui n'existaient pas dans Pokémon Version Verte, ont été ajoutées afin d'enrichir votre aventure et vous proposer encore plus de lieux à explorer !

Certains souvenirs restent à jamais gravés dans nos mémoires. Qu'il s'agisse de choisir votre premier partenaire Pokémon, d'affronter une sombre organisation ou encore de faire des rencontres légendaires, un monde de rêves, d'aventures et de Pokémon vous attend !

Ce titre est prévu pour devenir compatible avec Pokémon HOME.
70010000118632.intro: Revivez l'aventure Pokémon Version Vert Feuille !
70010000118632.name: (Français) Pokémon Version Vert Feuille

70010000118633.description:
Dies ist die Version in deutscher Sprache.

Die Kanto-Region und bekannte Pokémon genau so, wie du sie in Erinnerung hast – mit aktualisierter Grafik im Vergleich zum ursprünglichen Game Boy-Titel. Außerdem wurden die Sevii Eilanden hinzugefügt, die in Pokémon Red Version nicht vorkamen. Die Gebiete, die du erkunden kannst, und somit auch dein Abenteuer werden dadurch erweitert.

Manche Erlebnisse bleiben einfach immer spannend, egal wie viele Jahre vergehen. Sei es die Wahl deines ersten Partner-Pokémon, die Auseinandersetzung mit einer finsteren Organisation oder die Begegnung mit einer Legende – eine Welt der Träume und Abenteuer mit Pokémon erwartet dich. Los geht‘s!

Für diesen Titel ist Kompatibilität mit Pokémon HOME geplant.
70010000118633.intro: Begib dich erneut auf das Abenteuer in Pokémon Feuerrote Edition!
70010000118633.name: (Deutsch) Pokémon Feuerrote Edition

70010000118634.description:
Dies ist die Version in deutscher Sprache.

Die Kanto-Region und bekannte Pokémon genau so, wie du sie in Erinnerung hast – mit aktualisierter Grafik im Vergleich zum ursprünglichen Game Boy-Titel. Außerdem wurden die Sevii Eilanden hinzugefügt, die in Pokémon Grüne Edition nicht vorkamen. Die Gebiete, die du erkunden kannst, und somit auch deine Abenteuer werden dadurch erweitert.

Manche Erlebnisse bleiben einfach immer spannend, egal wie viele Jahre vergehen. Sei es die Wahl deines ersten Partner-Pokémon, die Auseinandersetzung mit einer finsteren Organisation oder die Begegnung mit einer Legende – eine Welt der Träume und Abenteuer mit Pokémon erwartet dich. Los geht‘s!

Für diesen Titel ist Kompatibilität mit Pokémon HOME geplant.
70010000118634.intro: Begib dich erneut auf das Abenteuer in Pokémon Blattgrüne Edition!
70010000118634.name: (Deutsch) Pokémon Blattgrüne Edition

70010000118635.description:
Questa è la versione del gioco in italiano.

Ritrova le emozioni e i Pokémon della regione di Kanto proprio come li ricordavi, ma con grafica aggiornata rispetto al titolo originale per Game Boy. Con l’aggiunta del Settipelago, non presente in Pokémon Versione Rossa, le aree da esplorare e la profondità della tua avventura sono ora molto aumentate.

Non importa quanto tempo sia passato: certe emozioni non svaniscono. Che tu debba scegliere il tuo primo Pokémon compagno, affrontare una sinistra organizzazione o incontrare una leggenda, ti aspetta un mondo di sogni e avventure con i Pokémon! Andiamo!

In futuro si prevede di rendere questo titolo compatibile con Pokémon HOME.
70010000118635.intro: Immergiti di nuovo nelle avventure di Pokémon Versione Rosso Fuoco!
70010000118635.name: (Italiano) Pokémon Versione Rosso Fuoco

70010000118636.description:
Questa è la versione del gioco in italiano.

Ritrova le emozioni e i Pokémon della regione di Kanto proprio come li ricordavi, ma con grafica aggiornata rispetto al titolo originale per Game Boy. Con l’aggiunta del Settipelago, non presente in Pokémon Versione Verde, le aree da esplorare e la profondità della tua avventura sono ora molto aumentate.

Non importa quanto tempo sia passato: certe emozioni non svaniscono. Che tu debba scegliere il tuo primo Pokémon compagno, affrontare una sinistra organizzazione o incontrare una leggenda, ti aspetta un mondo di sogni e avventure con i Pokémon! Andiamo!

In futuro si prevede di rendere questo titolo compatibile con Pokémon HOME.
70010000118636.intro: Immergiti di nuovo nell’avventura di Pokémon Versione Verde Foglia!
70010000118636.name: (Italiano) Pokémon Versione Verde Foglia

70010000119888.description:
"Hello, Mario!" is a free application where you can touch Mario's face to play.

■ Play with Mario's face
Try poking Mario's face, pulling on it or spinning it and watch him react! What kind of face will he make next?
You can also tap the ? Block in the top left of the screen and select icons to add items like Super Mushrooms and Super Stars, pipes or even enemies.

■ Peekaboo!
Tap the leftmost icon in the menu to play peekaboo with Mario. Sometimes, a Boo might make an appearance, too...

■ Goodnight, Mario!
After a little while of playing together, Mario will get tired and go to sleep.
You won't be able to play with him while he's asleep. This is a good opportunity to have children take a break too.
(It is possible to disable this feature. To do so, tap the cog icon in the top right of the screen when starting the app.)

■ Play offline
Once you've downloaded the app, you don't need the internet to play!
70010000119888.name: Hello, Mario!

70010000122819.description:
Anyone can feel the flow in Rhythm Paradise Groove! Discover a colourful collection of funny little rhythm games, including music by renowned Japanese producer Tsunku♂.

You can do anything with rhythm! 
No matter how strange the situation, the rules are always the same: just press buttons in time with the beat! Hop through hoops, catch flying vegetables, swing sledgehammers, and much more – perform surprising feats with the music as your guide!
70010000122819.name: Rhythm Paradise Groove

70010000123634.description:
"Hello, Yoshi!" is a free application where you can touch Yoshi's face to play.

■ Play with Yoshi's face
Try poking Yoshi's face, pulling on it or spinning it and watch him react! What kind of face will he make next?
You can also tap the ? Block in the top left of the screen and select icons to add items like Super Mushrooms and Super Stars, pipes or even enemies.

■ Peekaboo!
Tap the leftmost icon in the menu to play peekaboo with Yoshi. Sometimes, a Boo might make an appearance, too...

■ Goodnight, Yoshi!
After a little while of playing together, Yoshi will get tired and go to sleep.
You won't be able to play with him while he's asleep. This is a good opportunity to have children take a break too.
(It is possible to disable this feature. To do so, tap the cog icon in the top right of the screen when starting the app.)

■ Play offline
Once you've downloaded the app, you don't need the internet to play!
70010000123634.name: Hello, Yoshi!

70030000015787.name: Kirby and the Forgotten Land Demo

70030000022410.name: Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer Demo

70030000024954.name: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream Demo

70050000000122.description:
The Master Trials includes the following content:

Trial of the Sword
In the Trial of the Sword, you start with no weapons or equipment and must fight your way through 45 rooms of fierce enemies. Your only tools will be those you gather along the way. But the reward for completing such a gruelling challenge is great: finishing the trial will make the Master Sword even more powerful.

Hero's Path Mode
A map update that allows you to see the path you've travelled. About 200 hours of gameplay can be tracked on the map this way. When watching your path unfold, you can adjust the replay speed to trace your past movements faster or slower. This mode may help you find shrines you've missed by showing the areas you've yet to explore.

Master Mode
Master Mode increases the level of all monsters. For example, red Bokoblins will become blue Bokoblins, and you'll encounter powerful new enemies that don't appear in Normal Mode. Monsters will also slowly recover health and will be able to detect you more easily. You may even see enemies and treasure chests appear in mid-air.

Travel Medallion
An item, found in a hidden treasure chest, that allows you to register your current location as a travel gate on the map. You can only register one travel gate at a time.

8 hidden items for you to find
The following items, which pay tribute to The Legend of Zelda series, can now be found in treasure chests scattered across Hyrule: Majora's Mask, Midna's Helmet, Tingle's Hood, Tingle's Shirt, Tingle's Tights, Phantom Helmet, Phantom Armor and Phantom Greaves. Can you follow the hints and find them all?

Korok Mask
The Korok Mask is found in a new, hidden treasure chest. If equipped, the mask will shake to inform you when a Korok is nearby.
70050000000122.name: The Master Trials - DLC Pack 1

70050000000186.description:
The Champions' Ballad includes the following content:

The Champions' Ballad
Following the guidance of an unseen voice, Link encounters a new test: the Divine Beast Tamer's Trial. Take hold of the One-Hit Obliterator to clear out monster encampments, discover new shrines, conquer a huge dungeon and more. Overcoming all these obstacles will earn you the power to call upon the Master Cycle Zero.

Additionally, help the travelling bard Kass complete an unfinished song left behind by his mentor. Better still, Kass is also inspired to write some verses of his own, revealing scenes from the Champions' and Princess Zelda's past that even Link never knew of. And what exactly could Kass's mentor's song be...?

Note: To play The Champions' Ballad content, you must first complete the four main challenges to free the four Divine Beasts.

9 hidden items for you to find
The following items, which pay tribute to The Legend of Zelda series, can now be found scattered across Hyrule: Island Lobster Shirt, Ravio's Hood, Zant's Helmet, Phantom Ganon Skull, Phantom Ganon Armor and Phantom Ganon Greaves. You can also find the Royal Guard Cap, Royal Guard Uniform and Royal Guard Boots, which were once worn by Hyrule's royal guards.

Ancient Horse Gear
The Ancient Bridle, which increases the spurs available when riding the equipped horse, and the Ancient Saddle, which lets you summon the equipped horse wherever it is, are hidden in treasure chests somewhere in Hyrule, waiting to be found.
70050000000186.name: The Champions' Ballad - DLC Pack 2

70050000001941.description:

70050000001942.description:
Meet Corvin, an Uchigatana-toting Light-element cool dude with a positive attitude! He comes in a Core Crystal with a 100% resonance rate, and can't wait to find a place in your party.

Elma, the Full Metal Jaguar BLADE colonel from Xenoblade Chronicles X, has arrived in Xenoblade Chronicles 2 as part of the Expansion Pass! Starting now, you can face her in the Challenge Battle Mode.

Crossette is bursting with excitement to finally meet you all! This Bitball-wielding Fire-element girl comes in a Core Crystal with a 100% resonance rate, and is very eager to prove herself!

The Poppibuster is ready to serve! To access him, finish the quest "Shiny New Power".
70050000001942.name: New Rare Blades

Passion of the Artisan

A Mercenary's Honor

70050000001943.name: New quests

70050000001945.description:
In this new story mode, uncover the full history of Jin and the fall of his homeland that took place 500 years before the events of Xenoblade Chronicles 2. The newly refined combat system lets you take control of both Driver and Blades as you explore a new Titan, the Kingdom of Torna.

The year was 3564…

The 107th Indoline Praetor, Rhadallis, had sent an armed expedition against the country of Coeia. Its capital, Omrantha, fell overnight and sank beneath the clouds, along with the rest of the Titan.

This cataclysm shook the whole of Alrest. As the dust settled, Indol and the newly-risen land of Empire of Mor Ardain claimed the credit for this devastation.

In fact, it had been the work of one Blade. The Aegis, a man known as Malos.

Discover how the fates of Jin and his Driver, Lora, intertwined with that formidable individual...
70050000001945.name: Xenoblade Chronicles 2: Torna - The Golden Country

70050000019994.description:
On top of the Nook Inc. Silk Rug that is available as an exclusive item from Nook Shopping, Nintendo Switch Online members will also be able to order a Nintendo Switch Lite as an in-game item after the latest update. It comes in four different colours, so pick your favourite when it pops up in Nook Shopping to order!
Notes:
- You need to have progressed far enough through the game in order to use miles at the Nook Stop.
- Even if other players on the island do not have Nintendo Switch Online memberships, they can still trade for the item. If other players cannot trade, please get the player with the reward to start the game and try again.
70050000019994.name: Exclusive items for Nintendo Switch Online members

70050000030743.description: Get creative and help design dream vacation homes for many of your favourite island residents in Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Happy Home Paradise, available as paid downloadable content for Animal Crossing: New Horizons.

(above items can also be acquired within the game)

Outfit colour variants
“Noah - Color #02”, “Mio - Color #02”, “Eunie - Color #02”, “Taion - Color #02”, “Lanz - Color #02”, “Sena - Color #02”
70050000035358.name: Xenoblade Chronicles 3 - Wave 1

70050000035359.description:
New Hero character: Ino – complete her quest to add her to your party and unlock a new class!

Challenge Battles – test your mettle in consecutive battles against tough enemies to earn rewards!

New swimwear outfits
70050000035359.name: Xenoblade Chronicles 3 - Wave 2

70050000035361.description:
New Hero character: Masha – complete her quest to add her to your party and unlock a new class!

New Challenge Battle: "Archsage's Gauntlet"  – select only one character and
battle wave after wave of enemies to earn rewards.

Craft Accessories: After adding Masha to your party, you can craft new accessories using crystals collected in "Archsage's Gauntlet".

New throwback outfits
70050000035361.name: Xenoblade Chronicles 3 - Wave 3

70050000035362.description: Set before the events of Xenoblade Chronicles 3, join a cast of new and familiar characters in this original story scenario that connects all three instalments in the Xenoblade Chronicles series. Future Redeemed also features new battle mechanics, such as Unity Combo, where two characters can attack in unison.
70050000035362.name: Xenoblade Chronicles 3 - Wave 4: Future Redeemed

70050000036095.description:
The inspiration behind it all returns to its 2D action roots! Castlevania’s unforgettable characters & gothic setting meet the fast-paced combat of the award-winning roguelite Dead Cells in this unprecedented collaboration.

A gateway to a striking castle has suddenly appeared, and an imposing warrior called Richter asks you to help him vanquish the great evil within. 

Enticed by the promise of new loot rather than a sense of moral duty, you strike out through the grounds and corridors of the gothic castle to find and kill this mysterious Dracula...

Slay hordes of his supernatural minions as you progress through our biggest DLC yet, including two levels, three bosses and a new storyline!

WIELD CLASSIC CASTLEVANIA WEAPONS 
Unlock 14 iconic weapons such as the Vampire Killer, Throwing Axe & Holy Water to decimate Dracula's bestiary of monsters and finally the dark lord himself. Each item has been translated into the fast-paced combat of Dead Cells while keeping their original essence. 

EXPLORE EVERY CORNER OF DRACULA'S CASTLE 
Secret rooms. Flame-lit corridors. Gloomy tombs. Beautiful paintings. Food hidden in the walls. Full of original monsters from the series, such as harpies, werewolves & haunted armors, the character of the iconic castle will transport you into the realms of gothic fantasy.

ENJOY CLASSIC & REIMAGINED MUSIC 
We're giving you access to an alternative soundtrack made of 51 of the original Castlevania tunes, that can be heard across the entire game. Yes, 51! 
On top of this, we've taken the 12  most iconic tracks, such as Vampire Killer, Bloody Tears and Simon Belmont's Theme, and reimagined them in the style of Dead Cells as a soundtrack for this DLC, while preserving the Castlevania ambiance of course.

DISCOVER A NEW STORYLINE 
Richter Belmont and Alucard will be by your side throughout your quest to vanquish Dracula, helping you to navigate the maze of Dracula’s Castle  and providing you with strong weapons (sometimes willingly, sometimes not). However, where there is good there is evil, so watch out for powerful foes who will try everything in their power to stop you from reaching the throne room.

MASTER THREE EPIC BOSS FIGHTS 
Fight against the very essence of evil in two intense duels versus Death and Dracula, both set against a majestic backdrop. If you can survive these gauntlets, prepare yourself for our most ambitious boss showdown yet...

UNLOCK CASTLEVANIA CHARACTER OUTFITS 
Unlock 20 outfits as you progress through the castle, letting you roleplay as all your favourite characters like Alucard, Richter Belmont, Simon Belmont, Maria Renard, Trevor Belmont, Sypha Belnades or even Dracula himself.
70050000036095.intro: Wield classic Castlevania weapons on a quest through Dracula’s Castle.
70050000036095.name: Dead Cells: Return to Castlevania

70050000047065.description:
Enjoy four game modes: "Original," "Time Limit," "Attack," and "Item."

"Original" is the usual Suika Game, and the player with the highest score wins. Once the box is full, play ends at that point. If the other side's score is higher, you win at that point. If you are losing, continue playing. Can you catch up to your opponent?!

"Time Limit" is a 5-minute intense competition, and the player with the highest score wins. When the rainbow gauge runs out, Poppy will drop fruits on her own, so you'll need to make decisions faster than usual!

In "Attack," the winner is the one who ends the opponent's game. On every 5th attempt, you can send an evolved fruit to your opponent's box. Sending a big fruit could turn the tables!

In "Item," the player with the higher score wins. Evolve fruits to get items, and use them strategically to gain an advantage. Timing your item use well could be the key to victory!
70050000047065.intro: A brand new two-player addition to the Suika Game is here; come and join the fun!
70050000047065.name: Suika Game Multi-Player Mode Expansion Pack-Offline

70050000047502.description:
Enjoy four game modes: "Original," "Time Limit," "Attack," and "Item."

"Original" is the usual Suika Game, and the player with the highest score wins. Once the box is full, play ends at that point. If the other side's score is higher, you win at that point. If you are losing, continue playing. Can you catch up to your opponent?!

"Time Limit" is a 5-minute intense competition, and the player with the highest score wins. When the rainbow gauge runs out, Poppy will drop fruits on her own, so you'll need to make decisions faster than usual!

In "Attack," the winner is the one who ends the opponent's game. On every 5th attempt, you can send an evolved fruit to your opponent's box. Sending a big fruit could turn the tables!

In "Item," the player with the higher score wins. Evolve fruits to get items, and use them strategically to gain an advantage. Timing your item use well could be the key to victory!

※ Online play mode requires a subscription to "Nintendo Switch Online" (paid).
70050000047502.intro: A brand new two-player addition to the Suika Game is here, come and join the fun!
70050000047502.name: Suika Game Multi-Player Mode Expansion Pack-Online

70050000056307.description:
More songs have been added! These new tracks will be played during the additional exercises suggested by Instructors and the EX Exercises available via the Free Training mode.

The tracks are selected at random, so you can focus on the high-speed exercises. Get moving to a variety of beats – from grooving retro game sounds to energetic EDM. Change up the mood and get into the rhythm!

*Please note that this pack is for EX Exercises only and cannot be used for regular exercises.
70050000056307.intro: EX Exercises get a new groove! An expansion pack featuring three original songs is available now!

70050000056804.description:
Kirby and the Forgotten Land – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Star-Crossed World includes Kirby and the Forgotten Land, improved graphics and frame rate throughout, plus a new story: Star Crossed World.

After the world is struck by a powerful meteor, Kirby must use his amazing abilities, including some all-new Mouthful Modes to clear a trail through uncharted territory in this exciting adventure.

Kirby and the Forgotten Land for Nintendo Switch required to use this upgrade pack, sold separately.
70050000056804.intro: Kirby's adventure continues on Nintendo Switch 2!
70050000056804.name: Kirby and the Forgotten Land – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Star-Crossed World Upgrade Pack

70050000056807.description:
Jamboree TV is a new way to play that's all about audience participation! Take on a variety of challenges along with Mario and friends. Let the games begin!

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
Super Mario Party Jamboree for Nintendo Switch required to use this upgrade pack, sold separately.
70050000056807.intro: A super-charged celebration for Nintendo Switch 2
70050000056807.name: Super Mario Party Jamboree – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Jamboree TV Upgrade Pack

70050000056808.description:
Explore the land, sky, and depths of Hyrule like never before on Nintendo Switch 2. 

With higher resolution, improved frame rates, and HDR support, the expansive world of Hyrule has never looked better.

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom for Nintendo Switch required to use this upgrade pack, sold separately.

70050000065275.description:
New ways to play
The Nintendo Switch 2 Edition of Animal Crossing: New Horizons uses the unique features of the console to offer even more ways to enjoy your island paradise!

Your island, clearer than ever
With the enhanced 4K resolution of the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, you’ll be able to see your island and its residents even clearer than before!

Get creative with mouse controls
Use the intuitive mouse controls of the Joy-Con 2 controller to redecorate your home, organise your furniture, create Custom Designs and even draw posts for the bulletin board.

New item: Megaphone
Purchase the Megaphone from Nook's Cranny, then use it to find your island friends by calling out their names. The built-in microphone of Nintendo Switch 2 will help find where they are, even if they’re far away from you!

Play with more friends at once!
In the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, up to 12 players can play together on one island online or up to eight players via local wireless play.

With GameChat, you’ll be able to talk to your friends while playing with them. And by connecting a compatible USB-C camera, such as the Nintendo Switch 2 camera (sold separately), they’ll be able to see your expressions as you play!


Animal Crossing: New Horizons for Nintendo Switch required to use this upgrade pack, sold separately.
70050000065275.name: Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70050000066478.description:
Hell rises once more in Reign of the Warlock, a transformative DLC for Diablo II: Resurrected. Rediscover the iconic story, gameplay and challenge that defined the original, now enhanced with additional content and an expanded endgame.  

Wield forbidden magic as the Warlock, a new class forged from demonic pacts and Hell itself. Discover new builds with brand new items, sets and runewords. Explore dynamic Terror Zones, face the Colossal Ancients in an ultimate endgame encounter and experience modernised quality-of-life upgrades. 

The age of the Warlock has begun; will you master the darkness or be consumed by it?
70050000066478.intro: Wield forbidden magic as the new Warlock class. Discover new builds, items, sets, runewords and an overhauled endgame.
70050000066478.name: Diablo II: Resurrected – Reign of the Warlock

70050000067586.description:
This DLC pack includes five tracks with arrangements of popular Phantom Thieves music that are ideal for training, as well as three T-shirts featuring crossover designs! Feel like one of the Phantom Thieves as you box to these game-themed beats!

・Wake Up, Get Up, Get Out There / ATLUS Sound Team
・Life Will Change / ATLUS Sound Team
・I believe / ATLUS Sound Team
・Rivers In the Desert / ATLUS Sound Team
・Last Surprise / ATLUS Sound Team
70050000067586.intro:
Exercise to Phantom Thieves music!
A DLC pack with five popular tracks and three crossover T-shirts!
70050000067586.name: Phantom Thieves Pack

70050000069174.description:
Lots of multiplayer fun awaits in this area of Bellabel Park! Visit the Local Multiplayer Plaza to enjoy 17 different co-operative and competitive attractions, where up to four people can play together – even via GameShare!

Alternatively, you can head to the Game Room Plaza and play with friends and family either online or via local wireless. Six different attractions await here, allowing up to 12 players to work together or compete for first place!

Super Mario Bros. Wonder for Nintendo Switch required to use this upgrade pack, sold separately.
70050000069174.name: Super Mario Bros. Wonder – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park Upgrade Pack

"Prototype Arsenal"*
"Prototype Suit"*

70070000030078.name: DLC Bundle 1

70070000030090.description:
Outer Hairstyle Set "Hairstyles 1" (Male/Female)
Outer Hairstyle Set "Hairstyles 2" (Male/Female)
Outer Face Parts Set "Facial Features 1" (Male/Female)
Outer Face Parts Set "Facial Features 2" (Male/Female)
"Glasses" Outer part (Male/Female)
"Eyepatch" Outer part (Male/Female)
"Man Bun" Outer part (Male/Female)

You must own DAEMON X MACHINA on Nintendo Switch to access downloadable content.

These items can be used to change your character's appearance and do not affect gameplay.

The items included in this set can also be purchased individually. Please be careful not to purchase duplicate content.
70070000030090.intro: A bundle that includes multiple sets and DLC content released for DAEMON X MACHINA.
70070000030090.name: DLC Bundle 2

70070000030726.description:
Embark on an enhanced pair of interstellar escapades in Super Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2! Journey into space on the hunt for Power Stars, overcome a universe of challenges and most of all – stop Bowser!

This game supports Brazilian Portuguese.
70070000030726.intro: Blast off in two classic cosmic adventures!
70070000030726.name: Super Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2

70070000030754.description:
The Mega Dimension DLC includes the following content:

Wave 1: Holo-X and Holo-Y Apparel Sets – available October 16th, 2025

Wave 2: Additional story content – available  December 10th, 2025

An additional story that can be enjoyed after completing the main story of Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
70070000030754.intro: Continue your adventures in Pokémon Legends: Z-A with the Mega Dimension paid DLC!
70070000030754.name: Pokémon Legends: Z-A – Mega Dimension DLC

70070000033588.description:
The Genre-Defining Action RPG, Better than Ever
Diablo II: Resurrected – Infernal Edition includes the critically acclaimed remaster of Diablo II and its Lord of Destruction® expansion, together with the brand-new Reign of the Warlock DLC. 
Journey through the Hell-scarred land of Sanctuary; faithfully preserved and enhanced with modern 3D graphics, remastered audio and updated cinematics. 
The included Reign of the Warlock DLC expands upon the Diablo II: Resurrected experience with the brand-new Warlock class, an overhauled endgame, fresh mechanics and modern quality-of-life updates. 
 
Eight Classes, Eight Players, Endless Replayability
Experience the story of a world ravaged by eternal conflict between the forces of Heaven and Hell. Obtain powerful items, master over 200 awe-inspiring skills across eight classes and vanquish the minions of the Burning Hells in 8 player co-op. Dominate the leaderboards, then get a fresh start with seasonal ladder resets that introduce new challenges. 
 
New Class - Warlock 
The Warlock arrives in Diablo II: Resurrected, a master of shadow who turns the power of the Burning Hells against itself. 
Command forbidden power through three unique paths:  
• Demon focuses on enslaving hellspawn and binding them into loyal, fearsome allies that fight at your command.  
 
• Eldritch channels searing mental magics into ordinary weapons, transforming them into conduits of devastating force.  
 
• Chaos unleashes the raw elements of Hell, fire and shadow allowing you to rain elemental destruction upon your enemies from afar. 
 
New Challenges, New Builds
Collect new Unique items, sets and runewords to create powerful new builds for classic classes. 
Take on expanded endgame challenges with Terror Zone updates, the Colossal Ancients fight, reworked enemy difficulty scaling and new mechanics that reward strategy and class mastery. 
Track your progress with the new Chronicle system, which shows all the items you’ve collected account-wide and rewards completionists with exclusive bonuses. 
 
Refined, Not Reimagined
Diablo II: Resurrected – Infernal Edition includes powerful quality-of-life updates without compromising Diablo II’s iconic feel. The new customisable Loot Filter reduces screen clutter, helping you identify the gear that matters most to you. Managing resources across characters is also easier than ever with updated Stash Tabs, including dedicated tabs for gems, materials and runes for quick sorting. 
 
Feeling nostalgic? Switch freely between eras and experience Diablo II the way you remember.
 
Cross-Game Rewards
Celebrate your journey through Sanctuary and beyond. Instantly unlock Kervek the Putrid Pet and the Forbidden Tethers Back Trophy in Diablo IV, giving your wanderer a touch of forbidden flair. You’ll also receive the Horadric Cube Housing Item in World of Warcraft, a timeless artifact to display proudly at your home in Azeroth.
70070000033588.intro: Diablo II: Resurrected – Infernal Edition includes the remaster of Diablo II and its Lord of Destruction® expansion, plus the new Reign of the Warlock DLC.
70070000033588.name: Diablo II: Resurrected – Infernal Edition

70070000035539.description:
Pokémon Champions + Starter Pack is a set that includes the main game and various in-game bonuses. The Starter Pack will make it easier to both obtain and train Pokémon, perfect for constructing a wider variety of teams.

Experience everything you love about Pokémon battles all in one place – in Pokémon Champions for Nintendo Switch. This battle-focused game features familiar mechanics such as Pokémon types, Abilities, and moves, allowing new and experienced Trainers alike to experiment with rich and varied strategies.
70070000035539.name: Pokémon Champions + Starter Pack
